AttachCsnInstance.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters; see ClientToken Idempotency
AttachCsnInstance.csnId: ID of the Cloud Smart Network (CSN)
AttachCsnInstance.instanceType: Type of the instance to attach; one of [ vpc | channel | bec_vpc ], representing VPC, dedicated line channel, or edge network respectively
AttachCsnInstance.instanceId: ID of the instance to attach
AttachCsnInstance.instanceRegion: Region where the instance to attach resides
AttachCsnInstance.instanceAccountId: Account ID that owns the network instance, used in cross-account attach scenarios
